data.title: Dekadeka
data.synopsis:
A kidnapping incident occurred. Two members of the Saitama Prefectural Police rush to the scene. But aside from their skills, don't these two have personality problems?

(Source: CG Anime Contest)

titles.title: 陛下わたしを忘れてください

data.title: Heika Watashi wo Wasurete Kudasai
data.title_japanese: 陛下わたしを忘れてください
data.synopsis:
Lunia, the eldest daughter of Count Persephone, has been mistreated and cast aside by her family. One day, a letter arrives declaring that she has been chosen to marry Hades Khronoa, the duke of the Khronoa family. Although they are known as the Lords of Death and the Empire's watchdogs, Lunia humbly accepts, relieved to finally escape her father's house.

However, when she arrives at her new home, Hades refuses to love or touch her. Lunia at first agrees, but she worries about her new husband's safety. The Khronoa family heads, though powerful, are cursed to go mad or die by the age of thirty unless they conceive a child with a bride chosen by God. Priests of the empire, worried that the nation will fall should Hades die, pressures Luna into drugging him.

Seven years later, after fleeing the duke's mansion, Lunia is secretly raising her twin sons, Uranus and Helios, in a neighboring country. On the night of their conception, she had a vision of them fighting under the Khronoa family crest, fearing that they will hate each other under the power of the cursed Khronoa bloodline. Despite her concealment, Hades eventually finds her, demanding answers about why she saved him and why she ran away.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

data.title: Shoujo Kou
data.synopsis:
An old man is trying to create a girl out of his memories. Little by little the doll is being made and given a physical body of machinery parts. The old man makes her as a pure creature, but she denies her identification. The doll demolishes herself, saying, “This is not Me!”

(Source: Geidai Animation)
data.background: 1st year work 2012 by Saya Fukase, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation.

titles.title: 人外教室の人間嫌い教師
A Misanthrope Teaches a Class for Demi-Humans

data.title: Jingai Kyoushitsu no Ningengirai Kyoushi
data.title_english: A Misanthrope Teaches a Class for Demi-Humans
data.title_japanese: 人外教室の人間嫌い教師
data.synopsis:
Shaped by experiences that left him weary of human relationships, Rei Hitoma openly dislikes people. Seeking a quiet, uneventful life, he accepts a teaching position at a secluded school in the mountains, only to discover that his classroom is anything but ordinary. The students under his care are demi-humans who have gathered there with a singular goal: to learn what it means to become human.

Despite his disillusionment, Rei finds himself responsible for explaining human behavior and social norms to mermaids, bunnies, werewolves, and the like. As his students earnestly struggle to understand humanity, their questions and aspirations gradually expose the contradictions in Rei's own beliefs.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]
data.background: Jingai Kyoushitsu no Ningengirai Kyoushi aired on ABC TV and TV Asahi's ANiMAZiNG!!! block.

data.title: Mata Raishuu
data.synopsis: Music video for the song Mata Raishuu by Meychan, featuring Hatsune Miku.

titles.title: Sekai Saikyou no Kouei: Meikyuukoku no Shinjin Tansakusha
The World's Strongest Rearguard: Labyrinth Country's Novice Seeker
世界最強の後衛 ～迷宮国の新人探索者～

data.title: Sekai Saikyou no Kouei: Meikyuukoku no Shinjin Tansakusha
data.title_japanese: 世界最強の後衛 ～迷宮国の新人探索者～
title_synonyms: The World's Strongest Rearguard: Labyrinth Country's Novice Seeker
data.synopsis:
Corporate slave Arihito Atobe's death in a freak bus accident marks the beginning of his new life as a kind of adventurer called a Seeker. Reborn into a fantasy world, he settles into a previously unknown job class called "rearguard," capable of providing his (all-female) party with critical attack, defense, and recovery support. And it comes with an added bonus: Simply being at the back of the party line increases his companions' fondness for him! Freed from the shackles of corporate life, Arihito is eager to start fresh as a newly minted Seeker!

(Source: Yen Press)

data.title: Jingzi
data.synopsis: A short film by Zuofeng Liu.

data.title: Hou Yi: Jian Shen
data.synopsis:
During the reign of Emperor Yao, the Yellow River God forcibly married a young woman, causing frequent floods. Several tribes rebelled and harassed the people, attempting to split Emperor Yao. Ten suns appeared in the sky simultaneously, and demons roamed the earth, bringing immense suffering and endangerment to the people.

The young archer Hou Yi, gifted the divine bow of the Sun God, quelled the rebellion, vanquished the demons, shot down nine suns, and turned the tide of war, fulfilling his ideal of "bringing peace to the world and happiness to all people," becoming a hero celebrated throughout history. 

However, the traitor Feng Meng, taking advantage of Hou Yi's absence on a campaign, stole the elixir of immortality from Hou Yi's home. In desperation, Chang'e swallowed the elixir, ascending to the moon and becoming an immortal. From then on, Chang'e and Hou Yi were forever separated, leaving behind a beautiful and moving myth.

(Source: Bangumi, translated)

titles.title: Zhen Dao Ge 3: Gucheng Bi Xue

data.title: Zhen Dao Ge 3rd Season
title_synonyms: Zhen Dao Ge 3: Gucheng Bi Xue
data.synopsis:
After bidding farewell to the retired Marquis of Dingwu, He Fangzhi, together with the reclusive Zhou Luobin, continues their journey through the martial world to investigate the truth behind his father's corruption case. 

The two travel from the capital to Jiyang City, a key town on the Liaodong border. "The north wind sweeps across the land, breaking the white grass; in the eighth month of the lunar calendar, snow flies in the northern sky," and with the machinations of those behind the scenes, He Fangzhi is besieged by numerous martial arts figures. He Fangzhi and Zhou Luobin overcome numerous obstacles, and the truth behind He Fangzhi's old case and the martial world grudges with He Fangzhi's master in Sichuan, the "Knife Demon," are gradually revealed. 

In each bloody battle, the martial world and the imperial court, choices and perseverance, ideals and conspiracies—the martial world map of Zhen Dao Ge will slowly unfold.

(Source: Tencent, translated)

data.title: Tianming Dashen Huang
data.synopsis:
Xuan Qi, with mediocre talent, was originally just an unranked supernatural being on the list of powerful beings, whose life's ambition was simply to survive to the end in this world, prioritizing safety above all else. However, during an outing, he happened to witness the fierce battle between the Alluring Empress and an ancient demon, becoming an innocent bystander caught in the crossfire. In this critical moment, Xuan Qi unexpectedly activated the "Heavenly Show" system, gaining the ability to continuously gain "Admiration Points" by displaying the demeanor of a peerless master. Subsequently, Xuan Qi, by sheer chance, was forced to appear as the "reincarnation of the God Emperor," seemingly effortlessly slaying the ancient demon and defeating a series of masters from the Otherworldly Demonic Path. 

From that moment on, he became famous throughout the land, revered by the entire Great Victory Divine Continent. Even more miraculously, his every word and action was always misunderstood as having profound meaning. Countless supernatural beings regarded him as a god, while the Otherworldly Demonic Path considered him a major threat.  

(Source: Tencent, translated)
